description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a light wood frame and a minimalist design. The bed features a wide, slatted headboard made of the same wood as the frame, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The mattress is covered with a light blue fitted sheet, and a matching blue comforter is neatly spread over the top. Two blue pillows rest against the headboard, adding a touch of comfort and color coordination. The bed sits low to the ground, with sturdy wooden legs and a solid base that gives it a robust appearance. The overall look is clean, functional, and suitable for a modern urban bedroom.
description: A modern platform bed with a light wood frame, slatted headboard, and blue bedding with matching pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted headboard, two blue pillows, and the full blue comforter covering the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the blue bedding, and the depth of the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the slatted headboard and the solid wood construction of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue bedding, pillows, and the sturdy wooden legs of the bed.
